import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import "./Header.css"; export default function Header() { const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false); const [dropdownOpen, setDropdownOpen] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { // Check if the user is authenticated by checking localStorage const token = localStorage.getItem("authToken"); if (token) { setIsAuthenticated(true); // User is logged in } else { setIsAuthenticated(false); // User is not logged in } }, []); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem("authToken"); setIsAuthenticated(false); setDropdownOpen(false); navigate("/"); }; return (
Park Your Bike
{/* Conditionally render buttons or profile icon */} {!isAuthenticated ? ( <> ) : (
{/* Profile Icon */} {/* Dropdown Menu */} {dropdownOpen && (
setDropdownOpen(false)} > Profile {/* setDropdownOpen(false)} > Settings */}
)}
)}
); }
